/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libargj801_sensors_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libargj801_sensors_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/argj801_sensors_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/argj801_sensors_msgs/msg/motor_telemetry__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argj801_sensors_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/argj801_sensors_msgs/msg/odometer__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
